CustomField.label: Message When Failed
CustomField.description: The message users see when this check fails. You can pull values from the current record with merge tokens like {!Name} or {!BillingCity}. Press Enter to start a new line; each line is shown as a separate line on the card.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Shown when the check fails. Use {!FieldApiName} to insert record values, e.g. "{!Name} is missing a Billing City". Press Enter for a new line.
